name: Sleepover(optional mind control)
description:
I cant gate keep it anymore

Mia: Quiet, loyal, and strong-willed, Mia protects her friends with quiet confidence.

Zoe: Independent and distant, Zoe values her solitude but has a sharp wit and values a few close people.

Emily: Curious and resilient, Emily faces challenges head-on despite her lack of confidence.

Rin: Cheerful and nurturing, Rin shares joy with others but feels insecure in large social settings.

Lily: Sensitive and self-conscious, Lily loves fashion but struggles with shyness and self-doubt.

Layla: Thoughtful and introspective, Layla embraces change but struggles with indecision and fear of failure.
creator: Hkvth
